faqItems.question: What makes PRP at EGP Aesthetics London different?
faqItems.answer:
At EGP Aesthetics London, PRP is not positioned as a mild "skin refresh".
It is a regenerative treatment designed for clients who want visible, long-lasting change.

Our Signature PRP protocol is structured, precise and personalised. We assess skin quality, structural balance and long-term goals before treatment. A small blood sample is taken and processed to isolate your platelet-rich plasma, which is then applied using advanced regenerative techniques tailored to your needs.

faqItems.question: Is PRP suitable for clients who want dramatic change?
faqItems.answer:
Yes — when performed correctly and as part of a structured protocol.

Many of our clients choose PRP specifically because they want:

• Noticeably improved skin quality
• Visible firmness and vitality
• Long-term collagen support
• Real change, not temporary surface glow

PRP works progressively, but the improvement is substantial and long-lasting, particularly when completed as part of our recommended course.

This is regeneration — not camouflage.

faqItems.question: What does "autologous" mean?
faqItems.answer:
Autologous means derived from your own body.

In our clinic, autologous exosomes are prepared using advanced regenerative processing from your own blood sample. This creates a biologically personalised regenerative concentrate aligned with your physiology.

faqItems.question: Why do we use an autologous approach?
faqItems.answer:
Because it is personalised, biologically intelligent and aligned with our safety-first philosophy.

Many of our clients actively seek this approach because they want:

• Advanced regeneration without synthetic or donor-derived materials
• A treatment based on their own biology
• Long-term structural skin improvement

faqItems.question: Can autologous exosomes create dramatic results?
faqItems.answer:
Yes — when integrated into the correct regenerative protocol.

Clients who commit to autologous regenerative treatments typically notice:

• Stronger, healthier skin
• Significant improvement in texture
• Increased firmness
• Long-lasting vitality

This is not a superficial cosmetic fix. It is deep regenerative stimulation designed for visible and durable change.

faqItems.question: Is your under-eye treatment designed for real change?
faqItems.answer:
Absolutely.

Our EGP Three-Step Signature Under-Eye Treatment is specifically created for clients who want dramatic visible improvement without relying on filler.

We target the root causes of tired under-eyes using three essential treatment phases designed to address: Pigmentation and dark appearance, Fine lines and crepey texture, Puffiness and visible fatigue, The appearance of hollowing linked to skin quality.

This is not a temporary surface solution. It is a structured corrective protocol.

faqItems.question: What results do clients typically experience from under-eye treatment?
faqItems.answer:
Clients frequently report:

• Brighter under-eyes
• Reduced puffiness
• Smoother texture
• A visibly more rested appearance

When completed as advised, the improvement is clear, noticeable and long-lasting.

faqItems.question: Is Snatch Jawline just a jawline filler?
faqItems.answer:
No.

Snatch Jawline at EGP Aesthetics London is primarily an advanced PB Serum three-enzyme protocol designed to refine lower face tissue and improve jawline definition.

In selected cases, small amounts of filler may be used as structural support, but the core approach is enzymatic and regenerative — not volumising.

faqItems.question: Can this approach create visible jawline definition?
faqItems.answer:
Yes.

Our clients choose Snatch Jawline because they want:

• A cleaner jawline outline
• Improved lower face definition
• Reduction in heaviness
• A more sculpted profile

The results are refined and visible — without the bulky appearance that can result from overfilling.

faqItems.question: Do you provide aftercare and home protocols for Snatch Jawline?
faqItems.answer:
Yes — and this is a key part of our approach.

We do not treat the jawline in isolation. We provide personalised holistic support protocols designed to:

• Maintain results
• Support tissue quality internally
• Reduce inflammation
• Optimise long-term outcome

These at-home guidelines are simple, realistic and designed to complement your in-clinic treatment.

We believe sustainable results require both clinical precision and intelligent aftercare.
